decisionReason: Manual approval selected Manufacturer Page for the requested final URL.
Create New Page is appropriate because the existing product page should not be rewritten for manufacturer-intent traffic.
Content is complete, metadata exists, FAQ/CTA/Internal Links are present, and image gaps are non-blocking backend notes.
New page can use manufacturer route and sitemap entry without modifying main.
riskIfPublishedWrong: Medium cannibalization risk with the existing hex dumbbell product page if internal links and page intent are unclear.
Route and sitemap changes must be reviewed in Preview before any merge.
Image assets are currently missing; this should not block the workflow but final visual quality should be reviewed manually.
requiredSiteChange: Add manufacturer dynamic route if absent
adminNote: Full Publishing Workflow Test V1.0 manual decision. Do not merge or publish during this test.
